---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lurasidone 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lurasidone</strong> 目前有 <strong>45 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lurasidone 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of schizophrenia in adults aged 18 years and over.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（100.0%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（100.0%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>congenital disorder of glycosylation with defective fucosylation（100.0%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（99.9%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（99.9%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（99.9%）</li>
<li>Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, demyelinating, type 1G（99.9%）</li>
<li>myopia 26, X-linked, female-limited（99.9%）</li>
<li>atypical glycine encephalopathy（99.9%）</li>
<li>bipolar disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>distal 17p13.3 microdeletion syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（99.6%）</li>
<li>hydrops-lactic acidosis-sideroblastic anemia-multisystemic failure syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>Malan overgrowth syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>schizophreniform disorder（98.8%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（96.1%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（95.6%）</li>
<li>psychotic disorder（95.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
